utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with providers, monthly costs, coverage details, and a total health cost — fully specified. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with provider, cost, details, plus an adventure_equipment item and a total property cost — home/contents with costs is present, so meets the item. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with provider, monthly cost, coverage details, and total travel cost — fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes an enhancement service with cost and details, plus a total additional cost — fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual totals and a breakdown with previous cost and savings — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists providers/items that must be matched to the ground-truth rating entries. For health coverage, both physical and mental list LifeFirst Standard Plan, which has ratings 9 in both primary_health_coverage sections. For property coverage, home_contents lists HomeFirst Standard Coverage with rating 8, and adventure_equipment lists Technology Protection add-on, which corresponds to Technology Protection in property_enhancement_services with rating 6. For travel coverage, adventure_travel lists LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance with rating 9. The additional_services include adventure_equipment_protection at €40/month described as protection for climbing/diving equipment; this aligns with Technology Protection at €40/month with rating 6.
